mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (order_id, user_id, fruit_id, order_item_id, rating, content, create_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{fruitId}, #{orderItemId}, #{rating}, #{content}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, oi.fruit_name, oi.fruit_image FROM review r LEFT JOIN order_item oi ON r.order_item_id = oi.id WHERE r.order_item_id = #{orderItemId}
SELECT r.*, oi.fruit_name, oi.fruit_image FROM review r LEFT JOIN order_item oi ON r.order_item_id = oi.id WHERE r.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY r.create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM review WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT order_item_id FROM review WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
